title: Array Technologies Inc (ARRY) Q3 2024 Earnings Call Highlights
text:
Array Technologies Inc (ARRY) Q3 2024 Earnings Highlights

Key Financial Metrics:

Revenue & Profitability:
- Q3 revenue reached $231.4 million, representing a 34% decline year-over-year
- Adjusted gross margin improved significantly to 35.4%, up 940 basis points from the prior year
- Adjusted EBITDA totaled $46.7 million (20.2% of revenue)
- Net loss of $155.4 million, primarily due to a $162 million non-cash goodwill impairment charge related to the 2022 STI acquisition

Cash Position & Operations:
- Free cash flow: $43.9 million
- Cash balance: $332 million
- Order book remained flat at $2 billion
- Adjusted net income: $26.5 million versus $31.7 million in Q3 2023

Guidance & Outlook:

2024 Full Year Expectations:
- Revenue guidance narrowed to $900-$920 million
- Adjusted gross margin: approximately 34%
- Free cash flow raised to $100-$115 million

Strategic Highlights:
The company demonstrated positive momentum through its OmniTrack terrain-following tracker, which now represents more than 20% of their global order book, indicating strong product diversification and market acceptance despite challenging industry conditions.
